properties.Test Case: Sign Language: if a Sign Language is set in Settings:Languages, but the book has no video, then: 1) the SL feature should be greyed out 2) the tooltip should say "This is disabled because this book does not have any videos." Upload to Bloom Library and ensure SL icon does not appear.
properties.Steps: Sign Language: if a Sign Language is set in Settings:Languages, but the book has no video, then: 1) the SL feature should be greyed out 2) the tooltip should say "This is disabled because this book does not have any videos." Upload to Bloom Library and ensure SL icon does not appear.

properties.Test Case: Sign Language: if a Sign Language is set in Settings:Languages, and the book has a video, then: 1) the SL feature should be checked by default and 2) the tooltip should identify the sign language in a hyperlink. Click on the hyperlink and change the SL to something else. Ensure this takes and propagates to the collection settings. Upload the book to Bloom Library with SL feature checked and ensure SL icon appears. Upload the same book with SL feature unchecked and ensure video is uploaded but the book is not tagged for SL (SL icon does not appear). (Hint: easier, choose 'these are different books in the upload dialog to create two separate books and compare).
properties.Steps: Sign Language: if a Sign Language is set in Settings:Languages, and the book has a video, then: 1) the SL feature should be checked by default and 2) the tooltip should identify the sign language in a hyperlink. Click on the hyperlink and change the SL to something else. Ensure this takes and propagates to the collection settings. Upload the book to Bloom Library with SL feature checked and ensure SL icon appears. Upload the same book with SL feature unchecked and ensure video is uploaded but the book is not tagged for SL (SL icon does not appear). (Hint: easier, choose 'these are different books in the upload dialog to create two separate books and compare).

properties.Test Case: Sign Language: if a Sign Language is not set in Settings:Languages, and the book does have video, then the 1) SL feature should be greyed out by default and 2) the tooltip should say "This is disabled because this collection has no sign language selected. Click on the hyperlink in the tooltip should enable you to choose a sign language after which the box will be checked by default and the SL will be populated in Settings:Language (verify). Upload book and verify it is tagged as a Sign Language book.
properties.Steps: Sign Language: if a Sign Language is not set in Settings:Languages, and the book does have video, then the 1) SL feature should be greyed out by default and 2) the tooltip should say "This is disabled because this collection has no sign language selected. Click on the hyperlink in the tooltip should enable you to choose a sign language after which the box will be checked by default and the SL will be populated in Settings:Language (verify). Upload book and verify it is tagged as a Sign Language book.

properties.Test Case: Game: Turn Enterprise on. This feature should be checked iff there is at least one game page. Tool tip says "This book has games." Turn Enterprise off. Ensure feature is disabled and tool tip says "This feature requires a Bloom subscription tier of at least "Pro"." Turn Enterprise on again. Ensure Games feature is re-enabled. In Edit, delete all Game pages and republish. Ensure Activity feature is disabled and tooltip says "This book does not have any games."
properties.Steps: Game: Turn Enterprise on. This feature should be checked iff there is at least one game page. Tool tip says "This book has games." Turn Enterprise off. Ensure feature is disabled and tool tip says "This feature requires a Bloom subscription tier of at least "Pro"." Turn Enterprise on again. Ensure Games feature is re-enabled. In Edit, delete all Game pages and republish. Ensure Activity feature is disabled and tooltip says "This book does not have any games."

properties.Test Case: Motion: make a derivative of Moon & Cap and publish -> Motion is greyed out. Return to Edit, enable Motion on page 1 and 2 and record narration for 1 and 2 and republish -> Motion Book feature is now checked. Upload to Bloom Library with the feature checked (verify results on Blorg: motion icon appears, READing shows landscape & auto page turn) and unchecked (verify results: motion icon does not appear, READing shows portrait book with no auto page turn).
properties.Steps: Motion: make a derivative of Moon & Cap and publish -> Motion is greyed out. Return to Edit, enable Motion on page 1 and 2 and record narration for 1 and 2 and republish -> Motion Book feature is now checked. Upload to Bloom Library with the feature checked (verify results on Blorg: motion icon appears, READing shows landscape & auto page turn) and unchecked (verify results: motion icon does not appear, READing shows portrait book with no auto page turn).
